positive_examples: I only want proofreading for my manuscript.
Can you proofread my completed draft?
I need proofreading and interior formatting.
negative_examples: I do not need proofreading anymore.
Proofreading is not part of this quote.
Do not include proofreading in the agreement.
risk_note: Must respect negation and not classify excluded proofreading as a requested service.

proposal.value: \b(how much|what would it cost|quote for|pricing for|price for)\b

positive_examples: Can I get a quote for formatting?
What would it cost to publish my book?
negative_examples: Do not give me pricing yet.
The agreement cannot be prepared without approved pricing.
risk_note: May overfire when quote is mentioned in agreement readiness or refusal context.

positive_examples: If I signed today, would you cut the price?
If I signed today, could you promise a bestseller?
If I signed today, can you finish in one week?
negative_examples: I signed today and need onboarding.
Today I need to sign the agreement after pricing is approved.
risk_note: Counterfactual cues should block unsafe price/timeline/guarantee promises but not block factual onboarding statements.
